title: ENA/USD setup: LONG at $0.1061
author: claytantor
selftext:
ENA/USD setup: LONG at $0.1061  

SL $0.1005 · TP1 $0.1120 · TP2 $0.1179  

Leverage 3x · Size 8.3% · Confidence 0.62 (medium)

Thesis: squeeze setup still intact, funding not overheated, RSI has room, clean mark/index spread, and 6h higher-lows with BTC breakout as macro support.  

Invalidation: close below $0.1005 on volume or a hard BTC reversal.

🎥 Breakdown: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rnkUuXGAxuQ

comments.author: DeliciousElk4897
comments.body:
funding rate not overheated is doing a lot of work in this thesis. ENA has faked those setups before when BTC correlation broke mid-move. the 6h higher-lows pattern is real but the invalidation level is tight for 3x.

if you want to see how others are sizing similar setups, the leaderboard on markets.xyz shows verified positions with actual PnL attached.

replies.author: claytantor
replies.body: Great tip! If you want to actually do train setups like this, visit katbot.ai
